overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy RPG showing a student character in Gryffindor robes exploring the Gryffindor common room in a medieval castle. The character moves from a cluttered side chamber into the main sunlit common room filled with other students, antique furniture, and magical decor, ending at a large stone fireplace.

scene_state.functional_zone: cluttered side chamber with storage furniture and artifacts

events.description: character moves toward stained glass window, increasing natural light illumination

agents.ego_description: walking around the cluttered room examining the silver lion statue and various objects near the window

entered.detail: large metallic silver statue of a lion standing on a pedestal
tall stack of wooden chairs piled against the stone wall
tall cabinet with glass doors containing various objects
wooden dresser with multiple drawers and items on top
large portrait in ornate gold frame hanging above the dresser
circular stained glass window with blue and red patterns

segments.scene_description: The character explores a cluttered side chamber filled with storage furniture, including a prominent silver lion statue and stacked chairs. The space features stone walls, a stained glass window, and various antique furnishings as the character moves toward the window for better light.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden doorway corridor connecting side room to main hall

events.description: character passes through wooden doorway into the large main common room

agents.ego_description: walking through the carved wooden doorway from the side chamber into the main common room

entered.detail: arched wooden doorway with red frame leading to the main hall
vertical banners with red and gold stripes hanging on the wall

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a narrow doorway corridor, leaving the cluttered side room behind. The lighting dims in the passage before transitioning to the bright, spacious main common room visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: Gryffindor common room with seating areas and large stone fireplace

events.description: character turns and walks toward the large stone fireplace at the far end of the room
approaching the lit fireplace, warmth and firelight become more prominent in the scene

agents.ego_description: walking through the common room observing other students and magical decor, eventually stopping at the large fireplace

notable_agents.action: student sitting in armchair reading a book near the fireplace
group of students in black robes conversing near the window

entered.detail: massive stone fireplace with carved lion mantels and burning fire inside
walls covered in red and gold tapestries with tree and crest patterns
tall arched windows with stone frames letting in bright morning light
ornate iron chandelier hanging from the high vaulted ceiling
tall wooden bookshelves filled with books against the tapestry wall
antique sofas with red velvet upholstery arranged in seating groups
large antique terrestrial globe on a wooden stand

segments.scene_description: The character enters the grand Gryffindor common room, a spacious hall with high vaulted ceilings, tall gothic windows streaming with sunlight, and walls adorned with red tapestries. Other students sit reading and conversing on antique furniture throughout the space. The character walks past bookshelves and seating areas, approaching the massive stone fireplace with carved lion mantels that serves as the room's focal point.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a cluttered, intimate side chamber into the expansive, sun-drenched grandeur of the Gryffindor common room. It begins amidst stone walls and antique furnishings, passing a silver lion statue and stacked chairs as the character moves toward the light of a stained glass window. The scene then shifts through a narrow, dim corridor that serves as a brief transition before opening into the bright, spacious main hall. As the camera enters the room, the environment expands into a high-vaulted space filled with red tapestries and sunlight streaming through gothic windows, with students scattered across antique seating. The movement finally glides past bookshelves and reading areas, drawing closer to the massive stone fireplace and its carved lion mantels.
